activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT 
DISTINCT eci.proj_id PROJECT
,  eci.r_code PSR_R_CODE
, ecin.description PSR_DESCRIPTION
, eci.client_po_number PSR_PO_NUMBER
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'MDR_SUB_FUNCTION')) PSR_SUB_FUNCTION
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = '9 COM NUMBER')) PSR_9COM_NUMBER
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'VENDOR NAME')) PSR_VENDOR_NAME
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'SOURCE/LOCATION')) PSR_SOURCE_LOCATION
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'PROJECT_CRITICAL_PACKAGE')) PSR_CRITICAL_PACKAGE
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id=eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'TAGGED/BULK')) PSR_TAGGED_BULK
, mc.mc_code
, mc.order_seq mc_seq
, ms.scheduled_date planned_date
, ms.planned_date forecasted_date
, ms.actual_date actual_date
, eci.estimated_ros_date PSR_ROS_DATE
, eci.mset_id pset_id
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id = eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'WEEKS (EXW)')) PSR_WEEKS_EXW
, (SELECT attr_value FROM m_sys.m_used_values WHERE used_type = 'ECI' AND pk_id = eci.eci_id AND attr_id = (SELECT MAX(attr_id) FROM m_sys.m_attrs WHERE attr_code = 'TRANSIT TIME (WKS)')) PSR_TRANSIT_TIME
, (eci.estimated_ros_date- (select ms.scheduled_date from m_sys.m_milestones ms,m_sys.m_ms_configs mc where ms.eci_id =eci.eci_id and ms.mc_id=mc.mc_id and mc.mc_code='ETA')) PSR_FLOAT_MATERIALS
, (eci.estimated_ros_date- (select ms.planned_date from m_sys.m_milestones ms,m_sys.m_ms_configs mc where ms.eci_id =eci.eci_id and ms.mc_id=mc.mc_id and mc.mc_code='ETA')) PSR_FLOAT_MATERIALS_P
, eci.eci_comment PSR_REMARKS
FROM m_sys.m_eng_comm_items eci
    , m_sys.m_ms_sets mst
    , m_sys.m_eng_comm_item_nls ecin
    , m_sys.m_milestones ms
    , m_sys.m_ms_configs mc
WHERE eci.mset_id=mst.mset_id
    and ms.mc_id = mc.mc_id
    and eci.eci_id = ms.eci_id
    AND eci.proj_id= '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'
    AND ecin.nls_id(+)= 1
    AND ecin.eci_id(+)=eci.eci_id
ORDER BY eci.proj_id, PSR_R_CODE, mc_seq

text.value:
@concat('update [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']','
set week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
where week_end_date is NULL
and PROJECT = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')

@concat('delete from [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']',' where (week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ',
'''',
'Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
or week_end_date is null)
and PROJECT = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')
